73834.subject: OpenAI Targeted Google First. Is Intuit Next?
73834.body:
With an IPO in the works, you can gain exposure with The Disruptor’s Fund 2

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWMVBc3X864SVzY_Mt6tkJHMW61z83B5PJ1YsMwF3Tz3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3mSVNSNjk8w4RclW4PMjSw1fZStwMnq1L9fXC5WVcXZgt615P1qW48PK6y83RS-6W2xjp4T1L-XMCMwCWVmpLj5nW95KG4j8HGDW2N2yWCMxh_wQzW1GN-Fj782H3SW6Lp3GB5zbh3LW3ycs6n4n_mTjW6RbjLN9cZSPWW2qNGjl5FDJlvMdsLY2Dnw2JW3DBk128tnsqnW4TYgGy6GG_PmW3SZQl23qBPwQW5W-SS_8jsSCFW6QfHVL1yvWTnVTz18Q2pnPz7W11Glb_8WBrhGW1dLrhK8QlbN2N945C5QMRj3MW6-ZFW25D4qVLW1Xkwy572xXCtf6jgVVP04 )

Disruptor's Fund 2 Exposure to OpenAI, Polymarket & More (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWMVBc3X864SVzY_Mt6tkJHMW61z83B5PJ1YsMwF3TT3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3mCW5dmWfH3HRG05W97DMM665DyM6VnzynG55918hN4pZ683lLbFlW4FSwnJ1FShp_W5rRqgp23mPFbN1LKcyrP3zfcVPBLCL6_qNHcW8q_z3c5j517fW4VPFZR64KRkRN5qBq6d_X28qW1yrL6X9cNw-gW7f_TSM5Sn2z6W5gzJdD2Zr9NwW1KmNFW4bPkwVW11SqYD7YnN2QW7Nb7tn8DHVbPW8Tzh1B34Kf4cW4WRqn37vtlDhW33TnZ599jwwMW5nclTm64Lr37W1Vmk8x2xgtRvN2Dj6cS6PP8QW2mr5By5y3XVfW2KKrGX6J1tS5W3s0_lD2scYFFW7c-C7Y81310tW2nc5l07tzBSpf1LfQWd04 )

Hi Oleg,

OpenAI may have started with chat. Now, it appears to be setting its sights on entire industries.

ChatGPT’s new ad model is based on the context of entire conversations, not just keywords. That could challenge Google’s search business and create new ways to reach customers.¹

And as ChatGPT becomes more adept at bookkeeping, tax prep, and financial guidance, OpenAI could increasingly compete against specialized fintechs like Intuit.²

That broader vision follows a banner month for OpenAI:

- Defeated Elon Musk in a major courtroom victory.³
- Beat Anthropic’s Q1 revenue by about $1 billion.⁴
- Preparing to file an IPO in the coming weeks.⁵

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur. These reports don't imply specific results for investors with exposure to OpenAI on StartEngine Private. Past performance is not indicative of future results. There's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow, or that OpenAI will be profitable. See risks on the offering page.

Want exposure before any potential IPO headlines?

The Disruptor’s Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWMVBc3X864SVzY_Mt6tkJHMW61z83B5PJ1YsMwF3TT3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3mCW5dmWfH3HRG05W97DMM665DyM6VnzynG55918hN4pZ683lLbFlW4FSwnJ1FShp_W5rRqgp23mPFbN1LKcyrP3zfcVPBLCL6_qNHcW8q_z3c5j517fW4VPFZR64KRkRN5qBq6d_X28qW1yrL6X9cNw-gW7f_TSM5Sn2z6W5gzJdD2Zr9NwW1KmNFW4bPkwVW11SqYD7YnN2QW7Nb7tn8DHVbPW8Tzh1B34Kf4cW4WRqn37vtlDhW33TnZ599jwwMW5nclTm64Lr37W1Vmk8x2xgtRvN2Dj6cS6PP8QW2mr5By5y3XVfW2KKrGX6J1tS5W3s0_lD2scYFFW7c-C7Y81310tW2nc5l07tzBSpf1LfQWd04 ) provides exposure to 10 innovative companies across industries, including OpenAI, “AI factory” Crusoe, and Palmer Luckey’s new digital bank Erebor.

With over $4.6 million submitted in total, there are just 24 spots left for accredited investors.

View Opportunity

73832.subject: China’s world-beating solar industry is in turmoil
73832.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTJ9AAcAAAAAAhEMvKXwvLtcJP7UgbI1xgONU8VrNQDivOP-4RjUFtZNtz6En2qe30YLM174TVIlPq99I-JQ3SU12ehx3COT7uKQyKIad8OMHKq2qXvyok5_eA 

May 30th 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 Our best journalism, handpicked each day
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTJ9AAcAAAAAAhEMvKXx7UHqIBou_ucZHpzgw-3YNJ_WXMtxw9p6BmKdmXmuoRMmxn1ZfQnhiY1LjMRPe3KaFbvdROaO8F0c_y_dmIULVbs3ZxKLuSYxLyT75A 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTJ9AAcAAAAAAhEMvKXyXZNeGirw4U3NNU_IF7VcLB9DNHk5-KmxSHSuEt3MDyOSIdXqxjXXfDv9cTSNrQ9qKsoF5s78cYUAiUwGMa3jlQTro6TCQFPno1ka6A 



 
 
Anna Kerr

Senior audience editor



 China’s solar industry is notorious for its busts. But the current slump is of a different order. Although an energy crunch caused by the war in Iran has boosted the country’s solar exports, that will be small cheer to its companies, which face dimming domestic demand, a glut of solar-panel supply and rising protectionism in Western markets. Most have run at a loss for years. After blistering growth, the world’s solar factory 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTJ9AAcAAAAAAhEMvKXzzTCZCkV3fbyFnH1Ur5DkuQbD-i2RCWYJbK21NCUY7FnuW9mcAogbJGwZLk5fr8cqAr_PMiBTHHY7HekbnfPCWj5z8WhH0gQV 
faces a reckoning .
 


 Elsewhere, a very different type of company is struggling to perform: Karex, the world&rs

73831.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-30-cryptobeholder-5crzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BZklupSvhRmWlxUF0uF7BnQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=02zErGDGWMJYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpsjzk0j~il-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpsjzk0j-il
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: The market remains gripped by regulatory urgency and enforcement actions. While historic Bitcoin ETF outflows signal peak institutional caution, targeted infrastructure breakthroughs and massive government seizures are redefining the digital asset landscape for 2026. 🏛️US Treasury Seizes $1B in Iran-Linked Crypto Under "Operation Economic Fury" Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced the seizure of approximately $1 billion in Iranian-linked digital assets during the Reagan National Economic Forum. This massive enforcement action targets the IRGC's financial lifelines and signals an escalation in the U.S. use of blockchain analytics to "grab wallets" of sanctioned entities. Read full story ⚖️Senator Lummis Warns of Legislative "Dead Zone" Until 2030 for CLARITY Act Senator Cynthia Lummis issued a stark warning that the current Congress represents the final realistic window for federal crypto market structure rules. If the CLARITY Act fails to pass before the November midterms, the Wyoming Senator predicts a legislative freeze on digital asset regulation that could last until 2030. See details 🔒Circle Freezes $12.6 Million in Confidential USDC Following Court Order Stablecoin issuer Circle has blacklisted Zama’s confidential USDC contract on Ethereum, effectively locking over $12 million in user funds. The move has reignited intense debate over the censorship risks of centralized stablecoins and the fragility of privacy-focused DeFi protocols built on top of them. Read full story 📈Hyperliquid (HYPE) Hits $67.5 ATH and Briefly Overtakes Dogecoin The native token of decentralized perpetual exchange Hyperliquid surged to a new record high, briefly flipping Dogecoin to enter the top 10 cryptocurrencies by market cap. The rally follows the CFTC's approval of U.S. regulated perpetual futures, positioning Hyperliquid as a leading beneficiary of the shift toward on-chain derivatives. See details 💰Stellar (XLM) Surges 30% Following Major DTCC Tokenization Partnership XLM outperformed the broader market after the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) announced plans to integrate its tokenization service with the Stellar network. The collaboration aims to bring blue-chip equities and U.S. Treasuries to the Stellar blockchain for institutional-grade issuance and settlement by 2027. Read full

73829.subject: Weekly Recap: CFTC Approves First US-Regulated Bitcoin Perp
73829.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

TradFi is embracing DeFi-native infrastructure. Friday closed with the CFTC clearing the first US-regulated bitcoin perpetual, while ICE chairman Jeffrey Sprecher called Hyperliquid 'bigger than Nasdaq' only two weeks after his exchange was lobbying for a crackdown.

Outside capital markets, and in another sign that regulatory certainty is opening doors for digital assets, SoFi launched its bank-issued stablecoin to its 14.7 million customers on Wednesday.

Enjoy!

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/227ad23e-57ea-4aef-8a60-4f397ef55c8c/image.png?t=1780156424)
Caption: 

Ethereum's decentralised staking protocol just got a big upgrade! Saturn One brings 4 ETH validators, an RPL fee switch, and more. [Stake your ETH with Rocket Pool today.](https://rocketpool.net/)

———————————————————————————

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## 🟢 LIVE: Is it Over for DeFi?? w/ Kraken, Veda, Sentora

Youtube: 🟢 LIVE Is it Over for DeFi?? x/ Kraken, Veda, Sentora (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i545SNXGKIA)

**Camila Russo** sits with **Jonathan Gruener**, co-director at Kraken; **Sun**, co-founder and CEO of Veda; and **Anthony de Martino**, co-founder and CEO of Sentora — the team behind the new [Kraken Bitcoin Vault](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-launches-bitcoin-vault-earning-product-9qw9tr) — on whether the recent string of exploits has changed what institutional DeFi exposure looks like.

———————————————————————————

# Top Stories This Week

## CFTC Approves First US-Regulated Bitcoin Perpetual Futures

The [CFTC approved Kalshi's BTCPERP](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-approves-first-us-regulated-bitcoin-perpetual-futures) — the first bitcoin perpetual on a registered US exchange — and cleared Coinbase to route customers to its offshore Deribit affiliate. Same day, ICE chairman Jeffrey Sprecher called Hyperliquid 'bigger than Nasdaq,' two weeks after his own exchange was lobbying regulators to crack down on the venue. The US perpetual-futures regime opened in a hurry.

## SoFi Brings Its Bank-Issued Stablecoin to 14.7 Million Members

**SoFi** [opened SoFiUSD to its 14.7 million app members](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/sofi-brings-its-bank-issued-stablecoin-to-14-7-million-members), the first US bank-issued stablecoin inside a consumer banking interface. The launch was paired with Mastercard's New York BitLicense approval the same morning, and Cash App's stablecoin rollout to its ~50 million users. Three consumer fintech rails moved stablecoin work from infrastructure to retail distribution in one news cycle.

## Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion in 24 Hours as Leverage Unwinds

Crypto markets unwound nearly [$934 million in leveraged positions](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/crypto-liquidations-near-1-billion-24-hours-g13uhz)
